title: Marketplace Manager - Zostel Asia Pacific Associates - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Zostel Asia Pacific Associates - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Join the Zostel Asia Pacific Associates family as a Marketplace Manager in Vadodara. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Zostel Asia Pacific Associates:
Zostel Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zostel Asia Pacific Associates!
